sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69534" key="muwnia/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυ-ωνιά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μῦς</foreign> I) prob. <sense id="n69534.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μυωξία</ref></xr>, as a term of reproach for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a lewd woman</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0451.tlg001:9:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
